      <a href="#" data-page="home" class="js-nav">Home</a>
      <a href="#" data-page="story" class="js-nav">My Story</a>
      <a href="#" data-page="work" class="js-nav">Work</a>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  var links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  if (toggle && links) {
    toggle.addEventListener('click', function () { links.classList.toggle('open'); });
  }

  function showPage(name) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
    var target = document.getElementById('page-' + name);
    if (target) target.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('#navLinks a').forEach(function(a) {
      a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('data-page') === name);
    });
    window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'instant'});
    links.classList.remove('open');
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.js-nav').forEach(function(a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      showPage(a.getAttribute('data-page'));
    });
  });
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
